title: fagraea gracilipes
intro: Fagraea gracilipes, also known as the sweet-scented frangipani or the Borneo frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Fagraea gracilipes include the relief of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Fagraea gracilipes can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
